shots.description: Subdivisions of the asset. >3 is a HITL trigger (CLAUDE.md section 4 / config/editorial_vocab.yaml's hitl_shot_subdivision_threshold) enforced in code, not by this schema - the schema only guards against a pathological/runaway count.

in_s.description: Start of the usable source window for this shot (the portion of the asset judged relevant)

out_s.description: End of the usable source window. This is an availability ceiling, not the actual trim point - 08_timeline_builder trims to [in_s, in_s + hold_duration_s], which must be <= out_s. out_s may exceed in_s + hold_duration_s (more usable footage was available than what's shown).

hold_duration_s.description: Actual on-screen duration - the authoritative value 08_timeline_builder uses to trim and place this shot. Must fall within config/editorial_vocab.yaml's allowed range for the active pacing preset, and must be <= (out_s - in_s).

transition_out.description: Transition to the next beat; must be a value from config/editorial_vocab.yaml transition_families

rationale.description: One line, required for any non-default choice
